predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: leaves_descendants_or_adopted
predicates.description: The deceased leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_ascending_or_close_collateral
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: leaves_other_heirs_only
predicates.description: The deceased leaves only heirs other than those referred to in Art. 4.17 par. 1 and par. 2.

predicates.name: leaves_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased leaves no heirs at all.

predicates.name: is_common_property_share
predicates.description: The asset is the share of the deceased spouse in the common property of the spouses.

predicates.name: is_undivided_ownership_share
predicates.description: The asset is the share of the deceased spouse in property held exclusively in undivided ownership between the spouses.

predicates.name: is_own_property_remaining
predicates.description: The asset is part of the remaining own property of the deceased (not common or undivided).

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_return_4_24
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_return_4_25
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: deed_of_gift_excludes_usufruct
predicates.description: The deed of gift for the asset provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire usufruct of it.

predicates.name: testament_excludes_usufruct
predicates.description: The testament provides that the surviving spouse does not acquire usufruct of the asset.

predicates.name: legal_return_usufruct_excluded
predicates.description: The surviving spouse's usufruct over a legal-return asset is excluded by deed of gift or testament.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first) acquires usufruct of the entire estate of the deceased (second) under Art. 4.17 par. 1.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_common_property_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first) acquires full ownership of the deceased's (second) share in the common property (asset) under Art. 4.17 par. 2.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_undivided_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first) acquires full ownership of the deceased's (second) share in undivided property (asset) under Art. 4.17 par. 2.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_own_property_remaining
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first) acquires usufruct of the remaining own property (asset) of the deceased (second) under Art. 4.17 par. 2.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_legal_return_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first) acquires usufruct of the legal-return asset of the deceased (second) under Art. 4.17 par. 2(3), unless excluded.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first) acquires full ownership of the entire estate of the deceased (second) under Art. 4.17 par. 3.
